title: Submitting an IT Support Ticket
text:
Q: How do I submit an IT support ticket and what should I include?
A: To submit an IT support ticket, please access the IT helpdesk portal through the company intranet. Once there, click on the 'Submit a Ticket' button. In the ticket form, provide a clear and concise description of the issue you are experiencing, including any error messages. Be sure to include your contact information and the best times for our team to reach you. Additionally, if the issue is related to a specific device or software, mention the device type and software version. Finally, attach any relevant screenshots or files that may help us understand the problem better.
